## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Related issue

Link the issue this addresses, for example: `Closes #123`.

## User and safety impact

Explain the visible behavior change. Call out any effect on machine motion,
laser output, controller communication, job planning, project compatibility,
installers, updates, or stored user data.

## Validation

List the automated checks and manual tests you ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request is focused on one change.
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior where practical.
- [ ] Relevant Rust and frontend checks pass.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior or support changed.
- [ ] No credentials, private user data, generated artifacts, or local settings are included.
- [ ] New dependencies and copied code have compatible licenses.
